title: synth_xilinx infers RAM32X1D instead of RAM32M

features.name: multi_port_memory_three_read_ports
features.description: Code should include a memory array with three read ports and one write port, where read ports use combinational sensitivity with @(all)

features.name: xilinx_ram32m_inference_failure
features.description: Code should include a Xilinx-targeted memory with sufficient depth and width that could map to RAM32M primitives but synthesizes to individual RAM32X1D instead

features.name: asynchronous_read_memory
features.description: Code should include a memory with read operations in a combinational always block using @(all) sensitivity rather than synchronous read
features.snippet: always @(all) begin read1_data <= registers[read1_reg]; read2_data <= registers[read2_reg]; end
